attempts.failure: Engine core initialization failed with NotImplementedError: The page size of the layer is not divisible by the maximum page size. Cannot unify by adjusting block_size.
WorkerProc initialization failed with the same KV-cache page-size unification NotImplementedError.

observations: The text-only flag works: vLLM logs report that all multimodal limits are set to 0 and the run is in text-only mode.
Both Qwen3.5-4B and Qwen3.5-27B then fail after graph compilation while building KV cache groups.
This points to a Qwen3.5 + vLLM 0.18.1 hybrid KV-cache regression on the ROCm wheel lane rather than a plain VRAM fit issue.
